name: Sinsera Kiosk (Pi 5 — Chromium → sinsera.co)
description: Pi OS Lite (Bookworm, 64-bit) + a two-phase first-boot install that adds Chromium + X11 minimal stack and auto-launches https://sinsera.co/ in fullscreen kiosk mode on HDMI. Boots from NVMe (or SD). Targets Pi 5.

preconfigured.user: peta (no password — SSH-key only, sudo NOPASSWD)
preconfigured.kiosk_user: kiosk (auto-login on tty1, runs openbox + chromium --kiosk)

first_boot_sequence: Phase 1 (~30s): firstrun.sh sets up peta user + SSH + WiFi + hostname. Reboots.

Phase 2 (~5-8 min on Pi 5): apt-installs chromium + xserver-xorg + openbox + helpers; creates 'kiosk' user with autologin on tty1; writes .xinitrc + openbox autostart launching Chromium --kiosk https://sinsera.co/. Reboots into kiosk mode.
Phase 3 (~30s): Chromium opens fullscreen on HDMI.
